---
title: "Bristlecone"
image: bristlecone.jpg
image-alt: "The oldest living species of tree, the bristlecone pine, in the White Mountains of California."
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/smithjd/bristlecone
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/smithjd.bsky.social
---

Background

## History

A 5 year effort to look at the community and organization to describe how it's evolved.  

## Opportunity

People who have felt harmed or have criticizms of the community, the organization or leadership have gathered on [Reddit](http://reddit/r/ShambhalaBuddhism). Their conversations are preserved there but have largely been ignored as a toxic space. The opportunity is to look at the conversations and see if there are patterns that can be described and understood.

## Links

- Shambhala Societal Mirror: [https://mirror.shambhala.org](https://mirror.shambhala.org)
- Personal website: [https://Learningalliances.net](https://learningalliances.net)
